description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: There will be no Monthly Settlement Cycle conducted in December 2025. Instead, the Monthly Settlement Cycle conducted in January 2026 will be for the two
month period from November 1, 2025 to December 31, 2025.

For the Monthly Settlement Cycle conducted in January 2026, the Independent Calculation prepared by the Core Council Risk Advisor on behalf of the Core Council will only include calculations related to Spark. The Initial Calculation prepared by Operational Executor Agent Amatsu will be prepared normally. The calculations related to Spark will be subject to the normal resolution process defined in [A.2.5.1.2.1.3 - Final Calculation By Core GovOps](9de89bf3-9051-44f1-9ec0-d362ee4d4b38). For all other calculations, the amounts in the Initial Calculation will be treated as Agreed Amounts.
description: Do not merge until associated poll passes

diff: There will be no Monthly Settlement Cycle conducted in December 2025. Instead, the Monthly Settlement Cycle conducted in January 2026 will be for the two-month period from November 1, 2025 to December 31, 2025.

For the Monthly Settlement Cycle conducted in January 2026, the Independent Calculation prepared by the Core Council Risk Advisor on behalf of the Core Council will only include calculations related to Spark. The Initial Calculation prepared by Operational Executor Agent Amatsu will be prepared normally. The calculations related to Spark will be subject to the normal resolution process defined in [A.2.
.1.2.1.3 - Final Calculation By Core GovOps](9de89bf3-9051-44f1-9ec0-d362ee4d4b38). For all other calculations, the amounts in the Initial Calculation will be treated as Agreed Amounts.
